name: cc-context-monitor
description: User-invocable skill that configures an info-dense Claude Code statusline. Shows cwd, git branch (with dirty flag), model label, and three color-banded 10-dot progress bars: context window fill, 5-hour session rate-limit burn, and 7-day weekly quota burn — all read from Claude Code's native stdin payload, no external tools required on v2.1.x+.
